evidence: Feature importance scores extracted from classifiers ranked genes by aggregated importance across five algorithms; top 100 from each retained, consensus-filtered to 17 genes appearing in all algorithms. "Priority genes" identified by pathway enrichment counts (E2F3: 8 pathways, BRCA2: 7, MED1: 5) rather than importance magnitude. External validation on independent cohort achieved ROC AUC 0.78 with 0.86 sensitivity. Biological claims corroborated through Gene Ontology, KEGG, and Reactome pathway analysis across four databases.
